Somascope V1 Scaffold

Local-first wearables, daily-first analytics.

This scaffold locks in the v1 shape: single-user, local storage in the home directory, BYO provider credentials first, and export as a first-class feature.

Auth Loading...
Storage SQLite path reserved in ~/.somascope/
Exports Raw JSON, canonical JSONL, canonical CSV

API Snapshot

Loading...

BYO Provider Settings

V1 stores your provider app credentials only on this device. This keeps development simple and avoids a shared auth broker.

Settings load from `config.json` in your local data directory.
